name: Gashadokuro, the Skeletal Mayakashi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>骸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>むくろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まやかし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>餓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>髑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>髏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
You can only control 1 "Gashadokuro, the Skeletal Mayakashi". You can only use each of these effects of "Gashadokuro, the Skeletal Mayakashi" once per turn.
● If a Link Monster in your possession is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect while this card is in the GY: You can banish 1 other Zombie monster from your GY, and if you do, Special Summon this card.
● If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can activate this effect; this turn, this face-up card is unaffected by other cards' effects.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
